scripts.build:deps: bun run --filter @syncore/devtools-protocol build && bun run --filter @syncore/schema build && bun run --filter @syncore/core build && bun run --filter @syncore/react build && bun run --filter @syncore/svelte build && bun run --filter @syncore/platform-web build && bun run --filter @syncore/platform-node build && bun run --filter @syncore/platform-expo build && bun run --filter @syncore/next build
scripts.test: bun run build:deps && bun run snapshot:declarations && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:smoke:electron: bun run --cwd ../../examples/electron build && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.test:smoke: bun run test:smoke:web && bun run test:smoke:electron && bun run test:smoke:expo
